meaning: adj.爱因斯坦的,爱因斯坦理论的
examples: This article examines three of the newest and most exciting Einsteinian spin-offs emerging from research labs;
They are active ingredients of an animate geometry that embraces the linear and non-linear. Both Cartesian and post Einsteinian geometry are encompassed by it.
No one is tearing up the Einsteinian rule book just yet. As physicists well know, astonishing results like this often turn out to be wrong, especially when they haven't been double-checked.
The FX in "TRON: Legacy" have an almost Einsteinian elegance: They infuse light with gravity.
If NOvA finds the same result as OPERA and MINOS, then the post-Einsteinian era of physics really will have begun, and Fermilab will be in the thick of it.
